title: Senior Frontend Developer at Quikr International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Quikr International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Quikr International Enterprises, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Agra operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Quikr International Enterprises:
Quikr International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Quikr International Enterprises!
